# 005 Static Semantics

Status: draft
Source of truth: libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/static-semantics/

## Purpose

Document reusable validation rules over WorkflowIR.

## Normative Model

- Static diagnostics use stable IDs.

- Definitions and run creation should share semantic checks once IR exists.

## Examples

Unknown dependency references and dependency cycles are static semantic errors.

## Adding Or Changing This Concept

Add diagnostic IDs, tests, docs, and call sites for each new semantic rule.
